mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_money_flow (stock_code, stock_name, stock_price, stock_price_max, stock_price_min, turnover_rate, volume_ratio, per_roll, volume, amount, stock_price_rate, main_net, small_net, middle_net, large_net, super_net, trade_date, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.stockCode}, #{item.stockName}, #{item.stockPrice}, #{item.stockPriceMax}, #{item.stockPriceMin}, #{item.turnoverRate}, #{item.volumeRatio}, #{item.perRoll}, #{item.volume}, #{item.amount}, #{item.stockPriceRate}, #{item.mainNet}, #{item.smallNet}, #{item.middleNet}, #{item.largeNet}, #{item.superNet}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.createTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE stock_name = COALESCE(VALUES(stock_name), stock_name), stock_price = COALESCE(VALUES(stock_price), stock_price), stock_price_max = COALESCE(VALUES(stock_price_max), stock_price_max), stock_price_min = COALESCE(VALUES(stock_price_min), stock_price_min), turnover_rate = COALESCE(VALUES(turnover_rate), turnover_rate), volume_ratio = COALESCE(VALUES(volume_ratio), volume_ratio), per_roll = COALESCE(VALUES(per_roll), per_roll), volume = COALESCE(VALUES(volume), volume), amount = COALESCE(VALUES(amount), amount), stock_price_rate = COALESCE(VALUES(stock_price_rate), stock_price_rate), main_net = COALESCE(VALUES(main_net), main_net), small_net = COALESCE(VALUES(small_net), small_net), middle_net = COALESCE(VALUES(middle_net), middle_net), large_net = COALESCE(VALUES(large_net), large_net), super_net = COALESCE(VALUES(super_net), super_net), create_time = COALESCE(VALUES(create_time), create_time)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM stock_money_flow WHERE trade_date BETWEEN #{formerTime} AND #{latterTime} AND stock_price is not null ORDER BY trade_date ASC
